title: CC narrative review S04 panel a1

payload.notes: S04 fully delivers B03's void-side beat: executor fans the 20-idea deck (all 3 expected literals baked and legible: '20 IDEAS', '#01 schema-first', amber 'DDL T-19:42' sustaining the 24h clock), and both intended bubbles match the IR text exactly (executor shout '二十个方向，随便挑！' / reviewer terse '先过查新，再说挑。'), the shout-vs-terse contrast carrying the duo dynamic in a single read. The executor's leap is high but clearly below his S02 hand-off MAX jump, preserving the energy ladder, and the reviewer already sorting cards at the bench edge with a furrowed brow plants the novelty-gate setup the caption promises ('同一时刻，空洞里撒出 20 张想法卡。'). The lone warm desk lamp breaking the #0A0E27 gloom and the LLM DECODING / IDEA SPACE shelf spines keep the dark-cyber world contract alive. Minor deduction: the right-side audit-code column (def audit(plan)… with the PLAN→CHECK→OK/REJECT flowchart) is dense enough to briefly compete with the central card fan for the first read, so composition_story=4.5 while narrative_beat_fidelity=5.
